nasb.text: And the multitude of all the nations who wage war against Ariel, Even all who wage war against her and her stronghold, and who distress her, Will be like a dream, a vision of the night.

esv.text: And the multitude of all the nations that fight against Ariel, all that fight against her and her stronghold and distress her, shall be like a dream, a vision of the night.

cnv.text: 那時，所有攻擊亞利伊勒的列國眾軍， 就是所有攻擊亞利伊勒和它的堡壘， 以及迫害它的， 必如夢景，如夜間的異象。

ccb.text: 攻打、围困耶路撒冷及其堡垒的各国军队必如梦幻， 如夜间的异象一样消失。

csbs.text: 攻打亚利伊勒的万国众军， 所有攻打亚利伊勒和它要塞的，以及使它受困苦的， 都必像一场梦幻，又如夜间的异象——
